title: Beta Jappa Textures
body:
### THE TEXTURES WERE MADE BY JAPPA
[![](https://pbs.twimg.com/profile_images/1460155478386909185/jpvTCxSg_400x400.jpg)](https://twitter.com/JasperBoerstra)

Notes 
- some of the textures were just the programmer art , so i deleted them
- the ores textures were also deleted for color blind people

### ---For Future Update--- 

#### Make a texture for

- Nether Gold Ore (✅ since 0.0.2)
- Crimson Nylium (✅ since 0.0.2)
- Warped Nylium (✅ since 0.0.2)

#### Make also

- A variant Resource Pack with connected Texture
